hooks.prompt: If the file_path targets ~/plan-viewer/*.html (excluding index.html and glossary.html), STOP and verify: (1) Have you Read the SKILL.md and page-template.md in this session BEFORE writing? If not, cancel this Write, Read both files first, then rewrite. (2) Does the HTML contain FAB button group (.fab-group), annotation UI (banner, overlay, popover, toast), and all JavaScript? If ANY of these are missing, cancel and rewrite with the complete template. Key rules: technical terms need parenthetical explanations + glossary links, file/function names need role explanations, no code snippets, structure: summary → why → what → steps → points.
